title: Phone & Digital
description: Stay connected in Mandarin: Wi-Fi, SIM cards, messaging, and mobile payment.
situation: Staying connected: getting online, buying a SIM, messaging on WeChat, and basic tech words.

phrases.pinyin: wǒ de shǒujī méi diàn le
phrases.english: My phone is out of battery
Can I add you on WeChat?
phrases.tip: WeChat is essential for daily life in China.

phrases.pinyin: wǒ děng yíxià gěi nǐ dǎ diànhuà
phrases.english: I'll call you in a moment

phrases.tip: QR codes run almost everything in China, from menus to payments.

phrases.pinyin: nǐ de diànhuà hàomǎ shì duōshao?
